name: moondream_vision
author: Chihiro
description: Enable your character to see your screen, monitor your new window, and trigger reply automatically

name: whisper_asr
author: Chihiro
description: Whisper ASR using faster whisper and RealtimeSTT plugin for Shinsekai, multi-language supported

name: chat_ui_customize
author: Chihiro
description: Setting the theme of chat ui

name: playwright_browser
author: Chihiro
description: Enable your agents to operate Chrome

name: cloud_tts
author: End0rph1nww
description: （低配置 PC 福音，生动语音效果）接入 MiniMax、Qwen 等云端语音克隆生成模型，已支持自部署的GPT SoVITS等开源模型接入，支持角色 voice_id 绑定、参考音频复刻、语气提示词约束和云端语音生成

name: funasr_wss
author: umikok7
description: FunASR WebSocket ASR plugin for Shinsekai with self-hosted real-time STT support.

name: bilibili_live
author: Chihiro
description: 把B站直播间弹幕接入Shinsekai，让人物和弹幕互动

name: shinsekai_plugin_ci_smoke
author: Shinsekai Contributors
description: Small test plugin for Registry Issue, R2 package, logo and update detection flows.
desc: Small test plugin for Registry Issue, R2 package, logo and update detection flows.

review.notes: Request maintainer verification for this Shinsekai community plugin. | Verification request issue #15 | https://github.com/RachelForster/Shinsekai-Plugin-Registry/issues/15

name: memory_system
author: ferr
description: 一个为 AI 桌宠/角色扮演系统设计的长期记忆管理插件。解决的问题很简单：AI 的记忆窗口有限，聊久了就会忘记以前说过的话。这个插件让 AI 拥有“长期记忆”，可以自动归档旧对话、生成日记。
desc: 一个为 AI 桌宠/角色扮演系统设计的长期记忆管理插件。解决的问题很简单：AI 的记忆窗口有限，聊久了就会忘记以前说过的话。这个插件让 AI 拥有“长期记忆”，可以自动归档旧对话、生成日记。

name: mouse_control
author: pipi_
description: Shinsekai鼠标操控插件，实现char操控鼠标点击、拖动。搭配moondream/OmniParser使用。
desc: Shinsekai鼠标操控插件，实现char操控鼠标点击、拖动。搭配moondream/OmniParser使用。

name: shinsekai_heartbeat
author: Hard-to-tell
description: Let the current Shinsekai character speak after the user has been idle, with optional Moondream screen context.
desc: Let the current Shinsekai character speak after the user has been idle, with optional Moondream screen context.

name: cloud_vision
author: pipi_
description: 云端识图插件，支持接入Qwen、gemini、claude等云端识图api，也支持在llm配置页使用多模态的大模型。有三种识屏方式可供选择，主动调用识屏工具，一话一识屏；自动识屏，参考moondream定时识别屏幕；主动识屏，可以自动检测画面变化主动搭话。
desc: 云端识图插件，支持接入Qwen、gemini、claude等云端识图api，也支持在llm配置页使用多模态的大模型。有三种识屏方式可供选择，主动调用识屏工具，一话一识屏；自动识屏，参考moondream定时识别屏幕；主动识屏，可以自动检测画面变化主动搭话。

name: shinsekai_chat_phone
author: pipi_
description: 给用户提供小手机服务，可以跟不在同一场景的char发短信、打电话、听音乐。还可以让char主动发短信打电话哦！~可在配置页面配置角色头像、手机主题色。
desc: 给用户提供小手机服务，可以跟不在同一场景的char发短信、打电话、听音乐。还可以让char主动发短信打电话哦！~可在配置页面配置角色头像、手机主题色。
